spacing_and_layout.app_container: mobile-first approach, min-h-screen bg-[#F7F9F4] w-full max-w-md mx-auto relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col shadow-2xl bg-white

bottom_navigation.style: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#E4EBE5] flex justify-around items-center h-20 px-2 pb-safe z-40 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2
bottom_navigation.items: Agent (Home), Disease, Weather, Reminders, Market, Profile

floating_voice_button.style: absolute bottom-[96px] right-4 sm:right-auto sm:left-1/2 sm:-translate-x-1/2 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#2F6944] to-[#51A870] flex items-center justify-center text-white shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(81,168,112,0.4)] z-50
floating_voice_button.animation: Add an absolute pulsing ring behind the button using animate-ping and bg-[#51A870]/30

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(47,105,68,0.05)] border border-[#E4EBE5]

buttons.primary: w-full bg-[#2F6944] text-white h-14 rounded-xl font-semibold text-lg hover:bg-[#224A30] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: w-full bg-white text-[#2F6944] h-14 rounded-xl font-semibold text-lg border-2 border-[#E4EBE5] hover:border-[#2F6944] transition-colors
buttons.voice_option: flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 p-6 rounded-2xl bg-white border-2 border-[#E4EBE5] hover:border-[#2F6944] hover:bg-[#F7F9F4] transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.style: w-full h-14 bg-white border border-[#E4EBE5] rounded-xl px-4 text-[#1F2924] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#51A870] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-[#5C7364]/60

screens.Splash: Full screen bg-[#2F6944] or green gradient, app logo centered, subtle leaf patterns. Image: background blur of sunrise.
screens.Language_Selection: Large, tappable cards for each language (Hindi, Marathi, English) with voice icons. 'Tap or Say your language' prompt.
screens.Login_Signup: Phone number based login, large inputs, big Send OTP button.
screens.Profile_Setup: Name, Crop Types, Location. Uses Shadcn Form elements customized.
screens.Agent_Home: Greeting top bar (Hi, Ram!), Quick actions grid (Weather today, Check crops), large central 'Tap to speak' pulsing orb or voice activity visualizer.
screens.Disease_Analysis: Camera/Upload area (large dotted box), Image preview, AI Result card with diagnosis and treatment.
screens.Weather_Advisory: Large weather card, hourly forecast, farming advice based on weather (e.g. 'Good time to spray pesticides').
screens.Reminders: List of upcoming tasks. 'Add via voice' button.
screens.Market_Connect: Grid of produce, prices, 'Create Listing' button.

animations.transitions: framer-motion for page transitions (slide up/fade in).
animations.voice_active: multi-ring pulsing using CSS animations to simulate listening/speaking state.
animations.staggered_lists: Lists in Reminders or Market should animate in one by one.

splash_bg.description: A tranquil sunrise over a misty field in rural Punjab, India

farmer_avatar.description: Portrait of an elderly Indian farmer

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first app. Structure the main layout to be max-w-md mx-auto, mimicking a phone screen. Ensure a mobile wrapper container is used to restrict the width on desktop.
Ensure the floating voice assistant is visually prominent and accessible from all screens except Splash/Onboarding if not needed. Ensure it has a strong z-index.
For the bottom navigation, use fixed positioning inside the mobile container and adequate bottom padding (`pb-28`) on the main scrollable content so it's not hidden.
Use Lucide-React icons (e.g., Mic, Home, Leaf, CloudSun, Calendar, ShoppingBag, User).
Make sure all inputs and buttons have huge touch targets (min h-14) suitable for farmers.
Use the exact color hex codes provided, avoiding raw black/white text where possible (use #1F2924 for text).
Use Framer Motion or Tailwind's ping utility for the voice pulsing animations.
